settings.title: Ontario's Most Trusted Plumbing & Rooter Service

settings.editor: 24/7 emergency plumbing, drain cleaning, sewer repair, and more — serving Ontario, Rancho Cucamonga, Fontana, and 30+ Inland Empire cities.
From emergency response to routine maintenance — Regal Plumbing handles it all with licensed technicians and honest pricing.

settings.description_text: Burst pipes, sewage backups, and major leaks — we respond 24/7 to plumbing emergencies throughout the Inland Empire.
Professional drain snaking and hydrojetting to clear clogs fast and keep your pipes flowing properly.
Camera inspection, trenchless repair, and full replacement for damaged or collapsed sewer lines.
Repair, replacement, and new installation for tank and tankless water heaters — all brands and models.
Electronic detection and precision repair for leaks beneath concrete slabs — no unnecessary demolition.
High-pressure water jetting removes mineral scale, grease, and debris from drain and sewer lines completely.
Licensed gas line leak location, repair, and pressure testing for safe, code-compliant results.
Whole-home water softeners and reverse osmosis systems to improve water quality and protect your pipes.

settings.editor:
Regal Plumbing & Rooter is a family-owned plumbing company based in Ontario, CA, serving more than 32 cities across the Inland Empire and San Gabriel Valley. Founded on a commitment to honest service, fair pricing, and quality workmanship, we’ve built a reputation as the area’s most reliable plumbing team.

Our technicians are CA-licensed (#1097482), fully insured, and trained to handle everything from routine drain cleaning to complex slab leak repairs — always with transparent pricing before any work begins.

settings.testimonial_content: Regal Plumbing came out within the hour for a burst pipe emergency. Professional, fast, and fairly priced. Will use them again for sure.
They cleared a major sewer blockage in our Rancho Cucamonga home. Very knowledgeable team. Honest pricing with no surprise charges.
Detected our slab leak quickly without tearing up the whole floor. Saved us thousands. Regal Plumbing is the best in Fontana.

settings.description_text: Plumbing disasters don't wait for business hours. We dispatch immediately for emergencies throughout the Inland Empire — day, night, weekends, and holidays.
We quote before we work — always. No surprise charges, no hidden fees. Our technicians explain the work and provide a clear price before touching anything in your home.
CA License #1097482. Every technician is licensed, background-checked, and backed by full liability insurance — protecting your home and your investment.

tabs.tab_title: Do you offer 24/7 emergency plumbing service?
tabs.tab_content: Yes — Regal Plumbing & Rooter provides 24/7 emergency plumbing service throughout Ontario, Rancho Cucamonga, Fontana, and 30+ surrounding cities. When you call, we dispatch immediately — no waiting until morning for burst pipes, sewage backups, or gas leaks.

tabs.tab_title: How quickly can a plumber arrive?
tabs.tab_content: For emergency calls, we typically arrive within 45–60 minutes for most of our service area. We have technicians working throughout the Inland Empire and San Gabriel Valley daily, so we are rarely far from any location we serve.

tabs.tab_title: Are your plumbers licensed and insured?
tabs.tab_content: Yes. Regal Plumbing & Rooter holds CA Contractor License #1097482 and maintains full liability insurance and worker's compensation coverage. All technicians are licensed, background-checked, and trained to California plumbing code standards.

We provide upfront pricing before any work begins. For standard service calls, we assess the situation and quote you a firm price before touching anything. We believe in complete transparency — no surprises on your invoice.

We serve 32+ cities across the Inland Empire and San Gabriel Valley, including Ontario, Rancho Cucamonga, Fontana, Pomona, Chino, Corona, Upland, West Covina, and many more. Visit our Service Area page to see the full list.
